23P23.title: 23P23 - Ranger/Everest Stage V Panther 2.0L Bi-Turbo Charge Air Cooler Duct Loose
23P23.symptom:
In some affected Stage V Panther 2.0L Bi-Turbo Ranger/Everest vehicles, the charge air cooler duct joint between the turbo cuff and resonator spigot can become loose and detach causing a blow-off condition. In some cases, prior to a complete separation (partial separation) hissing noises and oil leak are noticeable.
The driver will experience reduction of power, an audible change in engine sound and white smoke from the engine bay. The engine will continue to run at decreased power, but with hesitation and/or a misfire.
23P23.concern:
In some affected Stage V Panther 2.0L Bi-Turbo Ranger/Everest vehicles, the charge air cooler duct joint between the turbo cuff and resonator spigot can become loose and detach causing a blow-off condition. In some cases, prior to a complete separation (partial separation) hissing noises and oil leak are noticeable.
The driver will experience reduction of power, an audible change in engine sound and white smoke from the engine bay. The engine will continue to run at decreased power, but with hesitation and/or a misfire.

15S24.title: 15S24 – Focus – Front Drive Halfshafts Replacement
15S24.symptom: Certain Focus vehicles have been fitted with front drive halfshafts that have a reduced wall thickness and therefore a reduced load carrying capacity. Under certain conditions the halfshafts may fracture.
15S24.concern: Certain Focus vehicles have been fitted with front drive halfshafts that have a reduced wall thickness and therefore a reduced load carrying capacity. Under certain conditions the halfshafts may fracture.

26-2215.title: Illuminated MIL In Conjunction With Intermittent Transmission Shift - Concerns In FORWARD Or REVERSE Gear With DTCs Stored
26-2215.symptom: Should a customer express concern that the Malfunction Indicator Lamp (MIL) is illuminated in conjunction with intermittent transmission shift concerns in FORWARD or REVERSE gear or the Transmission Wrench Light (TWL) is illuminated and DTCs (P0791 up to P0718) are stored in the PCM, the probable cause is a single wire of the transmission wiring harness. Abrasive wear to the wire insulation on the K2GP7J069-AC harness may cause the exposed copper wire inside to short circuit to the transmission
26-2215.concern: Should a customer express concern that the Malfunction Indicator Lamp (MIL) is illuminated in conjunction with intermittent transmission shift concerns in FORWARD or REVERSE gear or the Transmission Wrench Light (TWL) is illuminated and DTCs (P0791 up to P0718) are stored in the PCM, the probable cause is a single wire of the transmission wiring harness. Abrasive wear to the wire insulation on the K2GP7J069-AC harness may cause the exposed copper wire inside to short circuit to the transmission

22B44.title: 22B44 - MONDEO - Front Flexible Brake Hose Replacement
22B44.symptom:
In some of the affected vehicles, brake fluid may leak from one or both front brake flexible hoses. If the
amount of brake fluid is depleted below a predetermined level, the brake fluid warning indicator light
will illuminate.
22B44.concern:
In some of the affected vehicles, brake fluid may leak from one or both front brake flexible hoses. If the
amount of brake fluid is depleted below a predetermined level, the brake fluid warning indicator light
will illuminate.

25-2205.title: 2.0L Panther Engine - Rattle Noise from Transmission area at light acceleration.
25-2205.symptom: Some 2018-2022 Ranger and Everest/Endeavour vehicles equipped with a 2.0L (Panther) engine may present with concerns of a rattle type noise from the transmission during light to medium accelerator input.
25-2205.concern: Some 2018-2022 Ranger and Everest/Endeavour vehicles equipped with a 2.0L (Panther) engine may present with concerns of a rattle type noise from the transmission during light to medium accelerator input.

25SE6.title: 25SE6 – Transit and Transit / Tourneo Custom 12V AGM Battery Venting
25SE6.symptom:
A number of Transit and Transit / Tourneo Custom vehicles built with H7 AGM batteries may experience one or more
of, acid smell or smell of rotten eggs in cabin, hissing sound, visible gas venting battery, or heat in the seat.
Gas emissions during a normal Absorbent Glass Mat (AGM) battery gassing event produce hydrogen and oxygen,
however increased temperatures can lead to a side reaction which produces H2S (hydrogen sulphide). If exposure
is prolonged, health impacts such as nausea, dizziness and headaches may become more severe.
25SE6.concern:
A number of Transit and Transit / Tourneo Custom vehicles built with H7 AGM batteries may experience one or more
of, acid smell or smell of rotten eggs in cabin, hissing sound, visible gas venting battery, or heat in the seat.
Gas emissions during a normal Absorbent Glass Mat (AGM) battery gassing event produce hydrogen and oxygen,
however increased temperatures can lead to a side reaction which produces H2S (hydrogen sulphide). If exposure
is prolonged, health impacts such as nausea, dizziness and headaches may become more severe.

26-2274.title: Accelerated Wear Of The Rear Inner Brake Pads Or Scraping And - Grinding Noises
26-2274.symptom: Some 2021-2026 Next-Generation Ranger vehicles equipped with rear disc brakes, may present with abnormal and accelerated rear brake wear affecting only the inner pads, or scraping and/or grinding noises coming from the rear brakes.
26-2274.concern: Some 2021-2026 Next-Generation Ranger vehicles equipped with rear disc brakes, may present with abnormal and accelerated rear brake wear affecting only the inner pads, or scraping and/or grinding noises coming from the rear brakes.

21P08.title: Endura - 2.0L EcoBlue (Panther) EGR Mesh Filter Blockage
21P08.symptom: Certain Endura vehicles 2.0L EcoBlue (Panther) Engine may have been affected by the blocking ofthe EGR mesh filter. Blocking is caused by deposits from Urea/SCR emission after-treatment system. If filter becomes blocked a MIL can be set by DTC P049B due to low flow condition in low pressure EGR system.
21P08.concern: Certain Endura vehicles 2.0L EcoBlue (Panther) Engine may have been affected by the blocking ofthe EGR mesh filter. Blocking is caused by deposits from Urea/SCR emission after-treatment system. If filter becomes blocked a MIL can be set by DTC P049B due to low flow condition in low pressure EGR system.

26-2253.title: Illuminated Airbag Warning Lamp With Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) - B1405-13 And/or B1408-13
26-2253.symptom: Some 2022–2026 Next-Generation Ranger, Raptor, and Everest vehicles may exhibit an illuminated airbag warning lamp with DTCs B1405-13 and/or B1408-13 in the Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) or FordPass application; • Intermittent or active airbag warning indicator lamp. • FordPass application warning message; Safety control module detected a fault in the inflatable curtain circuit.
26-2253.concern: Some 2022–2026 Next-Generation Ranger, Raptor, and Everest vehicles may exhibit an illuminated airbag warning lamp with DTCs B1405-13 and/or B1408-13 in the Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) or FordPass application; • Intermittent or active airbag warning indicator lamp. • FordPass application warning message; Safety control module detected a fault in the inflatable curtain circuit.

20-2193.title: Vehicles Equipped With A 2.0L (Panther) Engine And 10R80 Transmission - Loss Of Motive Power With DTC P0868
20-2193.symptom: Some 2018-2019 Ranger and Everest vehicles equipped with a 2.0L (Panther) engine and 10R80 transmission may experience loss of motive power while in any gear (forward or reverse) accompanied with Diagnostic Trouble Code (DTC) P0868. Other DTCs may also be present.
20-2193.concern: Some 2018-2019 Ranger and Everest vehicles equipped with a 2.0L (Panther) engine and 10R80 transmission may experience loss of motive power while in any gear (forward or reverse) accompanied with Diagnostic Trouble Code (DTC) P0868. Other DTCs may also be present.

26-2292.title: Engine Misfire With An Illuminated MIL And DTC(s) P0301, P0302, P0303, - And/Or P0304 Stored In The PCM
26-2292.symptom:
Some of the vehicles listed equipped with 2.3L EcoBoost may exhibit all of the following conditions:
• Engine misfire condition. 
• Illuminated MIL with DTCs P0301, P0302, P0303, and/or P0304 stored in the PCM.
26-2292.concern:
Some of the vehicles listed equipped with 2.3L EcoBoost may exhibit all of the following conditions:
• Engine misfire condition. 
• Illuminated MIL with DTCs P0301, P0302, P0303, and/or P0304 stored in the PCM.
